message:
feat: add --agents-* CLI flags for AGENTS.md blurb management (bv-105)

Adds non-interactive CLI flags to manage beads workflow instructions
in AGENTS.md files, complementing the existing TUI prompt:

  --agents-check   Check blurb status (default)
  --agents-add     Add/create blurb
  --agents-update  Update to latest version
  --agents-remove  Remove blurb
  --agents-dry-run Show what would happen
  --agents-force   Skip confirmation prompts

Supports JSON output in robot mode for AI agent automation.
Walks up to 3 parent directories to find existing agent files.

Closes #105

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
